sections.sectionTitle: Migilote tungah Thutanga Sep ding Ngetna

verses.text: Topa ka Pasian aw, nangmah ka hong bel hi. Kei hong delhte' kiang panin hong dal in la hong hon in
Kei hong hon kei lecin a hong hon ding dang kuamah omlo ahih manin amaute in humpinelkai bangin hong kaikhia-in hong balgawp ding uh hi
Topa ka Pasian aw, ka gamtat a siat a, ka khut a khialh leh
bangmah thu omlopi-in ka lawmte khemin, ka galte ka huh taak leh
galte in kei hong delhin hong pha uh hen la, leilakah kei hong tuancilsak in la, leilakah kei hong sialpai ta uh hen
Tho in, Topa, a hehsa-in thasaan in la, ka galte' hehna panin kei hong dal in. Khanglo in, ka Pasian aw, thukhenna ding hun khat na seh khinzo hi
Nangma omna kiimah mite kikhawmsak in la, amaute' omna tung a sangna munah tu in
Topa in mite thu a khen hi. Topa aw, ka thumanna leh keima sunga om ka dikna tawh kizui-in thu hong khen in
Lungsim leh ngaihsutna a en a thuman Pasian aw, migilote' siatna beisak in la, mi thumante kipsak in
Pasian, kei hong hupa hi a, lungsim man mite a hon hi
Pasian, thu a tangin a khenpa hi a, migilote tungah a heh denpa ahi hi
Mite a kibawlphat kik kei leh, Pasian in a thalkhau suii zo a, a namsau taat ding hi
Amah in mei thaltang bawl a, sih theihna ama galhiamte a baihsa-in a koihzo hi
Migilo in thusia paii a, suak nuamin na a, zuauthu a hingkhia hi
Amah in gum to a, ama tawhsa gum sung mahah amah a kia hi
Ama lunggulh hoihlo pen ama lu tungah tukik a, ama gamtatsia pen ama luzang mahah tukik hi
Ke'n ahih leh, ama dikna om bangin Topa' tungah lungdamna ka lak ding a, a Sangpen Topa' min phatna la ka sak ding hi.
